{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324115611C4A6F8A3138EE97723D0\"}"},"total":18},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7373879698470585125","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的情节很吸引人，尤其是董悠然在职场上面临的各种困境和挑战，让我感同身受。我喜欢她在面对困难时的坚强和乐观，以及她对团队成员的关心和鼓励。故事中的人物形象鲜明，情节跌宕起伏，很值得一读。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716530056,"group_id":"6949779325415607332","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1xeHQR4zA+r0F+ljx2mmbw=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"117021084224730","user_name":"喜欢蓝闪蝶的于净"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"117021084224730","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6949779325415607332","book_info":{"abstract":"身为集团高管的董悠然行事干练，与女上司相处的每一天她都要步步为营，而面对男老板若有若无的情愫则让她如履薄冰，艰难应对。同时，来自平行部门的挤压与竞争让她缚茧难挣，下属的越位与躁动更让她麻烦重重。面对重重困境，董悠然疲于应付，她该如何在这样的局面中杀出重围破茧成蝶？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a731165084fe68612e1167ef226f816f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"莲静竹衣","author_id":"","book_id":"6949779325415607332","book_name":"办公室谋心记","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d02030","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"2.4万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":45,\"name\":\"影视小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=45\u0026name=影视小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":991,\"name\":\"国内影视\",\"s
